title: Service Manager Lifecycle

status_enum.Registering: entry created, not yet checked for deps
status_enum.Pending: waiting for one or more dependency services to reach Running

state_transitions: Registering → Initializing (when all deps already Running)
Pending → Initializing (triggered by last dependency reaching Running)

register(name, factory, options): create entry = { name, instance: ins, status: Registering }
push entry to services_l_; store in services_m_[name]
maybe_init_(name): NO  → for each unresolved dep: waiting_[dep].add(name)
init_service_(name, modifiers): set entry.status = Running; record entry.statusStartTS = new Date()
look up maybe_ready_set = waiting_[name] (dependents blocked on this service)
YES → for each dependent: push maybe_init_(dependent, { no_init_listeners: true }) to promises[]
YES → for each listener in init_listeners_: await listener()
wait_for_init(depends[]): create Promise with inner check() function
YES → remove check from init_listeners_; resolve Promise
NO  → register check in init_listeners_ (will be called by init_service_)
get_waiting_for_(depends[]): if services_m_[dep] missing → add to waiting_for
else if dep status !== Running → add to waiting_for
get(name): [DECISION] info missing? → throw Error('Service not registered')

dependency_resolution_pattern.description: Lazy, graph-based dependency resolution via waiting_ map
dependency_resolution_pattern.trigger: When a service reaches Running, init_service_ iterates waiting_[name] and re-attempts maybe_init_ for each blocked dependent
dependency_resolution_pattern.cascade: Resolving one service can unblock a chain of dependents via recursive maybe_init_ calls

key_relationships: ServiceManager creates service instances via factory.create()
ServiceManager calls entry.instance.as(TService) to access service interface
TService interface exposes: get_depends() and init()
init_listeners_ used by wait_for_init/aget to await arbitrary service readiness
concurrency_notes: register() yields one tick before processing (setTimeout 0) to allow batch registrations
init_service_ uses Promise.all for parallel dependent initialization
no_init_listeners modifier suppresses listener notifications during cascaded dependency resolution (avoids duplicate notifications)
wait_for_init is promise-based with a push-listener pattern rather than polling
important_notes: ServiceManager is the core DI/lifecycle orchestrator. Services declare their dependencies; the manager defers initialization until all deps are Running. aget() is the async-safe retrieval path. get() returns undefined (not an error) when a service exists but is not yet Running.
